title: Claude Code Skill Frontmatter
description: Schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter. Based on https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills and https://agentskills.io/specification

name.description: Skill identifier. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Must match parent directory name. If omitted, uses the directory name.

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it. Claude uses this to decide when to apply the skill. Combined description + when_to_use text is truncated at 1536 characters in the skill listing.

when_to_use.description: Additional context for when Claude should invoke the skill, such as trigger phrases or example requests. Appended to description in the skill listing.

license.description: License name or reference to a bundled license file (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

compatibility.description: Environment requirements (intended product, system packages, network access, etc.)

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value mapping for additional metadata (agentskills.io spec)

argument-hint.description: Hint shown during autocomplete to indicate expected arguments (e.g., '[issue-number]', '[filename] [format]')

oneOf.description: Space-separated named positional arguments for $name substitution

arguments.description: Named positional arguments for $name substitution in skill content. Names map to argument positions in order.

disable-model-invocation.description: Set to true to prevent Claude from automatically loading this skill. Use for workflows you want to trigger manually with /name. Default: false

user-invocable.description: Set to false to hide from the / menu. Use for background knowledge users shouldn't invoke directly. Default: true

oneOf.description: Space-separated list of allowed tools (e.g., 'Read Grep Glob')

allowed-tools.description: Tools Claude can use without asking permission when this skill is active

model.description: Model to use when this skill is active. Overrides for the current turn only. Accepts same values as /model, or 'inherit' to keep the active model.

effort.description: Effort level when this skill is active. Overrides the session effort level.

context.description: Set to 'fork' to run in a forked subagent context

agent.description: Which subagent type to use when context: fork is set (e.g., 'Explore', 'Plan', 'general-purpose', or custom agent name)

hooks.description: Hooks scoped to this skill's lifecycle. See hooks documentation for configuration format.

paths.description: Glob patterns that limit when this skill is activated. Claude loads the skill automatically only when working with files matching the patterns.

shell.description: Shell to use for !`command` and ```! blocks. Default: bash. Setting 'powershell' requires CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1.
